titleStmt.title: SII 26.2: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 2. (A.R. No. 2 of 1909.) POṈ-AMARĀVATI, TIRUMAYAM TALUK, TIRUCHIRAPPALLI DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the south wall of the central shrine in the Chōḷēśvara temple.

It records the royal gift of all lands in Piḷḷai vēḻārkuḍikkāḍu in Pūṅguṉṟanāḍu, specifying that three parts of it were to be utilised for food offerings during Sundarapāṇḍiyan-sandhi to the goddess Tirukkāmakōṭṭa-nāchchiyār, consort of the god Rājēndrachōḷīch-churamuḍaiya-nāyanār in Poṉṉamarāpati, situated in Puṟamalai-nāḍu and one part as maḍappuṟam for the Sirivāraṇapiriyaṉ Śrī-maṭha. The latter of the gifts was entrusted to Tirukkoḍuṅguṉṟamuḍaiyāṉ Suṇḍararpperumāḷ.
Cf. Inscriptions (Texts) of the Pudukkottai State, No. 312.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . komāṟu paṉmarāṉa tiripuvaṉac cakkaravattikaḷ coṇāṭu vaḻaṅki Aruḷiya cuntarapāṇṭi
ya tevaṟku yāṇṭu 2 10- tāvatiṉ Etirāmāṇṭu Aruḷiceyalpaṭi puṟa malaināṭṭu poṉṉamarā
pati Il Uṭaiyār Irācentiracoḷiccuramuṭaiyanāyanāṟku tirukkāmakoṭṭanācciyā
ṟku cuntarapāṇṭiyaṉ caṉtikku Amutupaṭikku maṟṟum Uḷḷiṭṭa veṇṭum nitta [ niman=ta] ṅkaḷu
kku pūṅkuṉṟanāṭṭu piḷḷaiveḷār kuṭikkāṭu perunāṅkellaikkuḷppaṭṭa nir nilamum puñ
caiyum maṟṟum EṟpepaṭṭatuvumRead eppeṟpaṭṭatum •nācciyāṟku mukkuṟum Ivūril cirivāraṉaRead cirivāraṇa •piriyaṉ cirima
ṭattukku maṭappuṟamāka kumpiṭṭu Irukkum Āṭṭarkaḷ tirukkoṭuṅkuṉṟa muṭaiyāṉ cuṉtara
pperumāḷukku Ivayalilum puñcaiilum nālattoṉṟum maṭappu varai
celvatākavum Iṉnācciyārkku mukkuṟum I Oru kūṟum Aṭṭikuṭuttatirukkaima
larile nirvāttu kuṭuttom paṉmāheśvararakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 26.2 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
